identity.name: MiniMax Scalping Agent
identity.aesthetic: Bloomberg Terminal met Cyberpunk. Minimalist, Data-Dense, Dark.

buttons.default: h-9 px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-medium transition-colors text-sm
buttons.outline: h-9 px-4 py-2 border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm transition-colors text-sm
buttons.ghost: h-9 px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm transition-colors text-sm
buttons.destructive: h-9 px-4 py-2 bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 rounded-sm transition-colors text-sm

cards.base: rounded-sm border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm
cards.header: flex flex-col space-y-1.5 p-4 border-b border-border/50

inputs.base: flex h-9 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.wrapper: relative w-full overflow-auto border border-border rounded-sm
tables.head_cell: h-10 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0

tech_stack.frontend: React (Create React App), Tailwind CSS, Recharts, Lucide React

installation_instructions: npm install clsx tailwind-merge class-variance-authority lucide-react recharts date-fns
universal_guidelines: Use dark mode ONLY. Do not implement light mode toggle.
Use 'manrope' for UI text and 'jetbrains mono' for all numbers, prices, and tickers.
Ensure all positive values are Green (#22c55e) and negative values are Red (#ef4444).
Use dense layouts. Avoid excessive padding in data tables.
All interactive elements must have hover states (bg-accent/50).
Use Recharts for all visualizations. Style them to match the dark theme (no white backgrounds).
Implement 'Retro-Futurism' touches: 1px borders, subtle glows on active elements.
Create .js or .jsx files. Remove all Type annotations if copying from TS sources.
